---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the ESA Platform
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

Describe the feature you want to add or improve.

## 🎯 Why This Feature?

Explain why this feature is useful or necessary.

## 🧩 Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this feature should work.

## 🔧 Alternatives Considered

List any alternative solutions or features you’ve thought about.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any extra details, screenshots, or examples here.
